description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a dense arrangement of trees, providing a secluded and private atmosphere. The structure features a prominent gable roof with multiple intersecting sections, and a light-colored facade accented by blue and gray tones. A driveway leads to a garage on one side, while the main entrance is marked by a small covered porch. The backyard includes a patio area with a pool, bordered by wooden decking and additional landscaping. Windows are distributed asymmetrically, with larger panes facing the front and smaller ones on the sides and rear. The overall setting suggests a suburban or semi-rural environment with ample outdoor space.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, surrounded by trees, featuring a driveway, garage, porch, and a backyard pool with patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance with porch, and dense tree coverage behind the house.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard pool, patio area, and intersecting rooflines, with trees enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the asymmetrical window arrangement, side landscaping, and the main building mass with trees in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage side, driveway extension, and the backyard patio area with pool and surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
